editorial.label: THE VISION
editorial.headline: A home shaped by light and intention.
editorial.description: Citrine Heights was imagined not as a tower on a skyline, but as a daily refuge — a place where proportion, calm and craft converge. This is the emotional architecture behind every residence: why you wake here, entertain here, and belong here.

split.headline: Rooms that breathe with the city.
paragraphs: We designed each residence as a sequence of moments — entry, gathering, retreat — with sightlines that frame Nairobi rather than compete with it. Ceilings rise with purpose. Terraces extend the living room into open air.
The result is not spectacle, but serenity: interiors that feel composed, generous and unmistakably yours.

image.alt: Master bedroom with refined finishes and soft natural light

pillars.title: Proportion
pillars.description: Every volume is calibrated — ceiling heights, room depths and terrace widths measured to create harmony, not excess.

pillars.title: Materiality
pillars.description: Stone, timber and glass chosen for how they age — surfaces that grow richer with time and daily use.

pillars.title: Continuity
pillars.description: From lobby to rooftop, a single design language flows uninterrupted — so the building feels authored, not assembled.

statisticsSection.label: BY THE MEASURE
statisticsSection.headline: Scale with intention.
statisticsSection.description: Numbers tell only part of the story — each figure reflects a deliberate design decision.

signatureImage.alt: Citrine Heights tower at dusk against the Nairobi skyline
signatureImage.overlay: Light writes every line of the façade.

moments.narrative: Espresso on the terrace as mist lifts from the city — the day begins in quiet, not hurry.

image.alt: Morning light across a refined kitchen

moments.narrative: A short walk to meetings, then home again — Westlands keeps your world within reach.

image.alt: Afternoon calm in an open living space

moments.narrative: The pool deck glows amber. Conversations linger as the skyline turns to gold.
From your balcony, a constellation of city lights — private, elevated, entirely yours.

location.label: THE ADDRESS
location.headline: Westlands — your daily orbit.
location.description: This is Nairobi's most connected neighbourhood — where embassies, galleries, restaurants and boardrooms share the same streets. Citrine Heights sits at its centre, close enough to move freely, removed enough to exhale.

image.alt: Evening ambience in a Westlands setting

developerVision.paragraph: We did not set out to build the tallest tower in Westlands. We set out to build the most considered — a residence that respects how people actually live, invest and grow. Every decision, from the lobby stone to the rooftop line, carries that promise.

cta.headline: Begin your chapter at Citrine Heights.
